About ProMove

A Small Team with a Big Commitment to Quality

We're a dedicated 3-person team based in Malaysia, specialising in making property transitions seamless and stress-free. Whether you're moving into a new home, refreshing it with paint, or installing your new TV — we handle it with precision and care.

🚚
Fully Equipped & Insured Professional tools, vehicles, and full liability coverage on every job
⏱️
Always On Time, Guaranteed We respect your schedule — punctual arrival on every booking
💎
Premium Quality Standard Every task completed to the highest standard — no shortcuts, ever
Meet Our Team →
What We Do

Complete Property Services Under One Roof

From the moment you pack your first box to the day you hang your last picture frame — we've got every service covered.

01
🚚

Moving In / Moving Out

Full-service relocation for homes and offices. We handle loading, careful transport, and complete unloading — nothing gets left behind or damaged.

Learn More →
02
📦

Packing & Unpacking

Professional packing with quality materials to protect every item. We pack, label, and unpack at your new space — all done for you.

Learn More →
03
🧹

Cleaning Services

Deep cleaning for move-in, move-out, post-renovation, and regular maintenance. Sparkling results with eco-friendly products.

Learn More →
04
🎨

Painting Services

Interior and exterior painting with premium quality paint. Smooth finishes, crisp edges, and a completely clean job site when we're done.

Learn More →
05
🛵

Delivery Services

Safe and timely delivery of furniture, appliances, and large items across Klang Valley. Store pickup or doorstep delivery available.

Learn More →
06
📺

TV Installation

Wall-mounting for all TV sizes and brands. Clean cable management and full setup — your living room will look like a showroom.

Learn More →
07
📷

CCTV Installation

Residential and commercial CCTV setup with full DVR/NVR configuration and remote mobile viewing. Protect what matters most.

Learn More →

FAQ

Questions? We've Got Answers

Everything you need to know before booking. Still unsure? Message us directly on WhatsApp — we reply fast.

💬 Ask Us Directly
How do I book a service?
+

Simply WhatsApp us at +60 12-345 6789. Tell us your service needed, property location, and preferred date. We reply with a quote within minutes and confirm your booking instantly — no forms, no waiting.

What areas do you cover in Malaysia?
+

We primarily serve Klang Valley — Kuala Lumpur, Petaling Jaya, Shah Alam, Subang Jaya, Puchong, Cheras, Ampang, Bangsar, Damansara, and all surrounding areas. For jobs outside Klang Valley, a small travel surcharge may apply.

How is pricing determined?
+

Pricing depends on the service type, property size, and any special requirements. We provide a transparent, itemised quote before any work begins — no hidden charges, no last-minute surprises. Ever.

Is my furniture protected during a move?
+

Absolutely. We use professional packing blankets, stretch wrap, and proper tie-down techniques to protect all furniture and fragile items. Our team is trained to handle every item with the care it deserves.

Do I need to provide any equipment or materials?
+

No — we bring everything. Packing materials, cleaning supplies, painting tools, mounting hardware, installation equipment. Just tell us your requirements and we arrive fully prepared.

What if I'm not satisfied with the results?
+

Your satisfaction is guaranteed. If you're not happy with any part of the service, let us know and we'll return to make it right — completely free of charge. This is our commitment on every single job.
